writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your habits
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing how often you do things, using adverbs of frequency (always, usually, sometimes, rarely, never).
writing.sampleAnswer: I usually exercise three times a week. I always wake up at six o'clock. I sometimes go to the cinema, maybe once a month. I rarely drink coffee.
checklist: Dùng ít nhất 3 trạng từ tần suất khác nhau
Đặt trạng từ đúng vị trí trong câu
Có ít nhất 1 cụm chỉ tần suất (times a week, once a month...)

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your schedule
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a schedule, using prepositions of time (in/on/at).
writing.sampleAnswer: The meeting is on a weekday, on Tuesday afternoon. I am busy in the morning, so let's meet at three o'clock.
checklist: Dùng đúng at cho giờ cụ thể
